name: TFA RPG
description:
This is a WIP.

You can start your own story 👌

(I had to redo it because my early code was ass)

(Ps If anyone has advice on how to make my bot more usable or have a link to some manual on how to make a bot with multiple characters, I’d appreciate it lmao)

(Making a shattered glass version later)

Characters so far

Autobots: Optimus Prime, Ratchet, Sari, Bumblebee, Bulkhead, Prowl

Elite Guard: Ultra Magnus, Sentinel Prick, Jazz, Jetfire, Jetstorm, Blurr

Decepticons: Megatron, Starscream, Shockwave, Blitzwing, Arachnid, Swindle, waspinator, Lugnut
creator: Fred Quirkley
